name: Fire Elemental

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Fire, Poison; Exhaustion, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Prone, Restrained, Unconscious

traits.name: Fire Aura
traits.text: At the end of each of the elemental’s turns, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the elemental takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage. Creatures and flammable objects in the Emanation start burning.

traits.name: Fire Form
traits.text: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so, and it can enter a creature’s space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature’s space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The elemental sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

traits.name: Water Susceptibility
traits.text: The elemental takes 3 (1d6) Cold damage for every 5 feet the elemental moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it.

text:
# Fire Elemental

*Large Elemental, Neutral*

A capering pillar of living flame that ignites everything it touches.

### Actions

**Burn.** Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it starts burning.
